title: The Maw

{{Quote|It's ionized gas, water vapor, possibly vacuum-breathing life forms swirling around The Maw.|[[L3-37]], describing the Akkadese Maelstrom|<ref name="Solo">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>}}
'''The Maw''' was one of the largest<ref name="TOG" /> and the worst<ref name="Ultimate Star Wars, New Edition" /> [[black hole]]s<ref name="Solo Expanded" /> located in the [[Maw Cluster]]<ref name="TOG" /> inside the [[Akkadese Maelstrom]]. Glowing a faint amber, it swirled and sucked debris in the area into its [[planet]]-sized [[gravity well]], causing objects to be crushed inside.<ref name="Solo Expanded">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition]]''</ref> It was also home to [[vacuum]] breathing creatures such as the [[summa-verminoth]].<ref name="Solo Junior">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: A Junior Novel]]''</ref>

==History==
Shortly after the [[Raid on Kessel]], [[Han Solo]], a member of [[Beckett's gang]], flew the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' near the Maw Cluster in order to escape a [[squadron]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]]s that had begun pursuing them after they stole [[coaxium]] from a [[Pyke Syndicate]] [[Spice mines of Kessel|mine]] on [[Kessel]]. While Solo was able to escape the TIE squadron, he unintentionally woke a massive, [[vacuum]]-breathing beast called a [[summa-verminoth]]. Solo flew extremely close to a [[gravity well]] of the Maw. The summa-verminoth followed, but was caught by the gravity well. The massive beast's skin was torn from its [[skeleton]] and was devoured by the gravity well, while the ''Millennium Falcon'' escaped due to [[Tobias Beckett]] putting a microscopic amount of coaxium into the [[hyperdrive]].<ref name="Solo" />

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:IntotheMaw.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art of the Maw, by [[Chris Voy]]]]
The Maw first appeared in the [[2018]] movie ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''. The name originated in the [[1994]] [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] book series [[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy|''The Jedi Academy Trilogy'']] as the name of the [[Maw Cluster/Legends|cluster]] of [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]].
